Privacy Policy

Last updated: January 2026

1. Information We Collect

This is a static portfolio website. We collect only information you voluntarily provide through the contact form: your name, email address, and message content.

We do not use cookies, tracking pixels, or analytics scripts. We do not collect IP addresses or browsing behaviour.

2. How We Use Your Information

Information submitted via the contact form is used solely to respond to your inquiry. Contact form submissions are processed by Web3Forms ‚ÄĒ their privacy policy governs that data.

3. Third-Party Services

This site loads resources from the following third-party services:

  • Google Fonts ‚ÄĒ typography (Inter). Font files are cached locally at build time and served from this domain. Requests reach fonts.googleapis.com only if the local cache could not be built (e.g. no network access during the build).
  • Iconify ‚ÄĒ social icons loaded on demand from api.iconify.design.
  • Web3Forms ‚ÄĒ contact form submission endpoint.

Each of these services may log your IP address as part of normal server operation. Please review their respective privacy policies for details.

4. Data Retention

We do not store any personal data on our own servers. Contact form data is retained by Web3Forms per their policy.

5. Your Rights

You may request deletion of any contact form submission by emailing kuremovi@purdue.edu.

6. Changes to This Policy

This policy may be updated periodically. The date at the top of this page reflects the most recent revision.

7. Contact

Privacy questions? Reach out at kuremovi@purdue.edu.
